title: Free-Standing Toilet Roll Holder, Stainless Steel, Toilet Paper Storage Stand Holds 5-6 Rolls, Silver
features: Material: This toilet roll holder is made of premium stainless steel, with smooth brushed nickel surface, which is waterproof, durable and easy to clean;
Dimensions (W x D x H): 17*17*65CM, the distance from the bottom of the shelf: 5.5cm. This toilet paper storage stand can hold 5-6 toilet paper rolls!
Heightened Shelf Design: The heightened bottom shelf design lifts the paper roll storage area off the ground, preventing it from getting wet or dirty.
Free-Standing Design: No drilling needed! Its freestanding design makes it easy to move anywhere. The bottom has a non-slip pad to protect your floor from metal scratches.
Easy to Install: Simple instruction. The classic design fits the toilet paper roll holder storage perfectly in every bathroom.
description: Combined toilet paper and spare roll holder, stylish freestanding toilet paper holder made of stainless steel with a modern stainless steel look and high-gloss finish.
